name: Soreheim Temporal Identity
work_cycles: Three 24-day work-week blocks per 72-day cycle structure labor, review, and celebration
Production and repair schedules are synchronized to industrial and agricultural cycles
legal_deadlines: Quota reviews and interregional allocations follow cycle logic rather than short weeks
shipping_windows: Industrial spans and allocation trains surge at cycle transitions and harvest-transfer windows
weather_expectations: 73-day celestial realignment interacts with geothermal and agricultural timing
mourning_and_renewal_customs: Communal remembrance is tied to contribution, repair, and continuation of labor after loss
public_language_about_time: People speak in cycles, first/second/third weeks, and contribution periods
